description_long: This wall-mounted sconce features a robust, rectangular backplate made of dark, possibly wrought metal with a slightly distressed finish. Extending from the backplate is a curved, scroll-like arm that supports a shallow, round dish designed to hold a single candle. The candle is cylindrical and white, positioned upright in the center of the dish, with a visible wick at the top. The overall design is utilitarian yet elegant, with subtle industrial and vintage influences, and the metal surfaces exhibit a matte, slightly rough texture. The sconce is intended to be affixed to a vertical surface, providing ambient or accent lighting in urban or historical settings. Decorative elements are minimal, focusing on the scrollwork of the arm and the geometric simplicity of the backplate.
description: A dark metal wall sconce with a scrollwork arm supporting a single white candle on a round dish, mounted on a rectangular backplate. The design is utilitarian with vintage and industrial influences.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved scroll arm, round candle dish, and the rectangular backplate.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat, rectangular backplate and the top of the scroll arm.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the scroll arm and candle dish, with the backplate visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the candle centered in the dish, the scroll arm below, and the symmetrical backplate.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage industrial style, with a simple rectangular backplate and a decorative scrollwork arm. The design is minimalistic, focusing on functional elegance and subtle historical motifs.
